response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrable professional C++ experience on Windows and has no clear exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domains — both mandatory requirements. Their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile stacks, with only a brief, academic C++ mention in a bachelor’s thesis and NI LabWindows, which does not meet the 5–10 year professional standard.
strengths: Strong full-stack and polyglot development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical workshops
Proven CI/CD, testing, and DevOps practices in agile environments
concerns: No evidence of professional C++ development on Windows platform
Lacks any documented experience in fixed income, capital markets, or banking domains
SQL experience is listed but not contextualized in enterprise financial systems
